Game: Twinkle Star Sprites 2005-12-28T00:00:00-08:00 Twinkle Star Sprites (ティンクルスタースプライツ, Tinkuru Sutaa Supuraitsu) is a 1996 competitive scrolling shooter arcade game originally created by ADK. It was ADK's last production for the Neo-Geo platform. The gameplay, which can be characterized as a combination of a fixed shooter and a versus puzzle game, uses combinations of shots, as well as timed power-ups to attempt to damage the opponent. These attacks also serve as counters to the opponent's attack. <1>http://images.launchbox-app.com/16c3fce8-c99d-4910-b947-8857e76e17bb.png</1> http://images.launchbox-app.com/8b33f7c9-5133-4205-b8e9-629341b23870.png http://images.launchbox-app.com/eb2da74b-0121-482f-8376-f13a668f1f01.png http://images.launchbox-app.com/05947736-9d42-4413-9cad-04e977975483.png http://images.launchbox-app.com/afc36e0a-424a-4548-a1f2-85613d52f36b.png http://images.launchbox-app.com/baafddec-3431-4f0b-8089-56024677f0bf.png http://images.launchbox-app.com/fba42c83-c206-4d6b-a9e5-333690e38b47.png https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Twinkle_Star_Sprites SNK Playmore SNK Playmore
